summary: Reframed the chapter opening around Owen leaving the Great Hall so the entry hands off more directly from the undercroft aftermath in chapter 7 and avoids echoing chapter 9's cold-kitchen opening scaffold.
edits: Shifted the opening from broad castle atmosphere to Owen's immediate exit from the Great Hall.
Kept the East Undercroft pressure in the first paragraph to preserve continuity with chapter 7.
Moved the kitchen descent into the second paragraph so chapter 8 enters through a different first action than chapter 9.
